sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: QS Stock Price, News & Analysis | Quantumscape
feed.summary: QuantumScape Corporation (QS) is focused on developing next-generation solid-state lithium-metal battery technology for electric vehicles, emphasizing higher energy density, faster charging, and enhanced safety. The company employs a technology licensing and partnership model, expanding collaborations with entities like PowerCo and major automakers, and has progressed on its Eagle Line pilot production and Cobra separator process. QuantumScape has also announced its intention to transfer its stock listing from the NYSE to Nasdaq.

feed.title: Wisconsin Electric Declares $0.90 Cash Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: Wisconsin Electric, a subsidiary of WEC Energy Group, has declared a cash dividend of $0.90 per share on its Preferred Stock, payable March 1, 2026, and an additional $1.50 per share on its Six Percent Preferred Stock, payable April 30, 2026. These dividends reinforce the company's shareholder return strategy and its stable market position serving over 1.1 million electric and 490,000 natural gas customers. Wall Street analysts currently forecast a potential rise in WEC stock price over the next 12 months, with an average target of $120.15.

feed.title: General Electric (GE) Reports Strong Q4 2025 Performance
feed.summary: General Electric (GE) reported a strong Q4 2025 performance, with a 74% increase in orders and a 20% rise in revenue for its GE Aerospace division. The company is strategically investing over $1 billion in MRO, focusing on LEAP capacity expansion, and exhibits robust financial health with a strong Altman Z-Score of 3.41. Despite positive analyst sentiment and strong market positioning, investors are advised to be vigilant of sector-specific risks and market volatility, as indicated by moderate beta and insider selling.

feed.title: CSX shares leap 6% after posting Q4 earnings beat despite subdued demand environment
feed.summary: CSX Corp. reported better-than-expected adjusted earnings per share of $0.42 for Q4 2025, surpassing analyst estimates, which caused its shares to jump 4% after hours. Despite a challenging industrial environment and a slight revenue miss, the company's Q4 results and full-year performance showcased operational strength. CEO Steve Angel emphasized productivity, cost control, and capital discipline as key drivers for improved financial performance in 2026.

feed.title: A drag queen bids farewell to Williams-Sonoma’s flagship store in San Francisco
feed.summary: Juanita MORE!, a prominent drag queen, reflects on the closing of the Williams-Sonoma flagship store in San Francisco, sharing personal memories of working there and meeting its founder, Chuck Williams. She highlights the store's community impact, its role in her life, and Chuck Williams's legacy as an LGBTQ+ advocate. The article also touches on the changing retail landscape in Union Square.

feed.title: The Truth About CarMax Inc: Why Everyone Is Suddenly Paying Attention
feed.summary: This article examines the current buzz around CarMax Inc., discussing whether the company offers true value to consumers or is simply benefiting from strong marketing. It covers CarMax's online convenience, fixed-price model, and extensive inventory, comparing it to rivals like Carvana. The piece also touches on the CarMax stock (KMX) and advises potential buyers and sellers to use CarMax as one data point in their car transaction strategy, emphasizing value in reduced stress rather than always the lowest price.

feed.title: How Southern homeowners can avoid burst pipes and insurance claims
feed.summary: Mercury Insurance (NYSE:MCY) has released a new homeowner preparedness guide for Southern states to help residents protect their homes from winter storms. The guide offers practical tips for exterior and interior home readiness, safe travel, and understanding insurance policies to prevent damage and reduce claims. This initiative by Mercury Insurance aims to mitigate losses and disruptions in regions increasingly affected by severe cold weather.

feed.title: KKR to Present at the 2026 UBS Financial Services Conference
feed.summary: KKR & Co. Inc. announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Robert H. Lewin, will present at the 2026 UBS Financial Services Conference on February 9, 2026, at 1:00 PM ET. A live webcast of the presentation will be available on KKR's Investor Center website, with a replay accessible shortly after the event. KKR is a global investment firm specializing in alternative asset management, capital markets, and insurance solutions.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical shares jump after beating Q4 expectations
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical Inc. (ISRG) reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with adjusted EPS of $2.53 and revenue of $2.87 billion, a 19% increase year-over-year. The company's performance was boosted by significant growth in da Vinci and Ion procedures, leading to a 1.3% jump in shares after hours. Intuitive Surgical also provided a positive outlook for 2026, projecting continued procedure growth and a healthy financial position with $9.03 billion in cash.

feed.title: Clorox buys GOJO Industries, the makers of Purell
feed.summary: The Clorox Co. has announced its acquisition of GOJO Industries, the maker of Purell, for $2.25 billion in cash. This strategic move aims to expand Clorox's presence in the health and hygiene sector, leveraging GOJO's strong position in skin health and hand hygiene solutions, particularly its number one share in hand sanitizer across B2B and retail channels. The acquisition is expected to scale Clorox's fastest-growing segment, Health and Wellness, and drive long-term shareholder value.

feed.title: Capital One to Buy Fintech Brex for $5.1 Billion in Cash, Stock
feed.summary: Capital One Financial Corp. has agreed to acquire Brex, a fintech company specializing in corporate expense management and accounting, for $5.15 billion. The deal will be split roughly 50% cash and 50% stock. This acquisition was announced alongside Capital One's fourth-quarter results.

feed.title: Kinetik boosts payout to $3.24 a year, sets Feb. 26 earnings call
feed.summary: Kinetik Holdings Inc. announced a 4% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.81 per share, totaling $3.24 annually. The dividend is payable on February 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 6, 2026. The company also scheduled its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings conference call for February 26, 2026, following its earnings release on February 25, 2026.

feed.title: NiSource Declares Common Stock Dividend
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.30 cents per share. This dividend is payable on February 20, 2026, to stockholders of record as of the close of business on February 3, 2026. NiSource is a major regulated utility company serving natural gas and electric customers across six states.

feed.title: Ryman Hospitality CEO, CFO to detail strategy at two March investor conferences
feed.summary: Ryman Hospitality Properties (NYSE: RHP) will participate in two institutional investor conferences in early March 2026, where CEO Mark Fioravanti and CFO Jennifer Hutcheson will present on company strategy and financial performance. The presentations will occur at the Raymond James conference on March 2nd and the Citi Global Property CEO Conference on March 3rd, with webcasts available for both events. The news highlights Ryman's engagement with investors and historically positive responses to promotional and earnings-related announcements.

feed.title: Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. Announces Participation in Upcoming Institutional Investor Conferences
feed.summary: Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. (NYSE: RHP) announced its participation in two upcoming institutional investor conferences: Raymond James & Associates’ 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference and Citi’s 31st Annual Global Property CEO Conference. Mark Fioravanti, President and CEO, and Jennifer Hutcheson, Executive Vice President and CFO, will present the company's financial performance and business strategy. Webcasts of the presentations will be available on the company's website.

feed.title: Jabil Declares Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.08 per share of common stock. The dividend will be paid on March 3, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 17, 2026. Jabil has consistently paid quarterly cash dividends on its common shares since May 15, 2006.

feed.title: Jabil Announces Appointment of New Chairman, Directors to the Board
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) has announced the appointment of Steve Raymund as the new Chairman of its Board of Directors. The company also added Thomas T. Edman and Raejeanne Skillern to its Board, bringing significant expertise in electronics manufacturing, cloud, and data center industries, which are critical to Jabil's strategic direction. These appointments are expected to enhance Jabil's leadership as it continues to drive long-term value for stakeholders.

feed.title: FIS Appoints Anil Chakravarthy to the Board of Directors
feed.summary: FIS (NYSE: FIS) has announced the appointment of Anil Chakravarthy to its Board of Directors, increasing the board size to ten members, nine of whom are independent. Chakravarthy, currently President, Customer Experience Orchestration Business at Adobe, brings extensive experience in enterprise software, cloud transformation, and AI-powered solutions. His expertise is expected to be invaluable as FIS continues to innovate in financial technology and expand its capabilities.

feed.title: NextNav to Participate in the Oppenheimer 11th Annual Emerging Growth Conference
feed.summary: NextNav Inc. announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Tim Gray, will participate in the Oppenheimer 11th Annual Emerging Growth Conference. The virtual conference is scheduled for February 3-4, 2026. NextNav is a leader in next-generation terrestrial Positioning, Navigation, and Timing (PNT) and 3D geolocation solutions.

feed.title: Eversource Energy Schedules Fourth Quarter Earnings Call
feed.summary: Eversource Energy will host an earnings conference call on February 13, 2026, at 9 a.m. Eastern Time, to discuss its financial performance and business updates through 2025. The company plans to release its full-year 2025 financial results on February 12, 2026, after market close. Eversource is recognized for its commitment to sustainability and clean energy initiatives in the Northeast.

feed.title: EQT Corporation Schedules Fourth Quarter and Year-End 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) announced that it will release its fourth quarter and year-end 2025 financial and operating results after market close on Tuesday, February 17, 2026. The company will also host a conference call on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results and other relevant matters, which will include a Q&A session for securities analysts. Investors can access the live audio webcast and its archive on EQT's investor relations website, ir.eqt.com.

feed.title: Avidity Biosciences stock hits all-time high at $72.70
feed.summary: Avidity Biosciences Inc. reached an all-time high of $72.70, marking a 141.25% increase over the past year, driven by investor confidence in its RNA-based therapies. The company also announced a Managed Access Program for delpacibart zotadirsen for Duchenne muscular dystrophy patients and will be acquired by Novartis for approximately $12 billion ($72 per share). Following the acquisition news, analysts at Chardan Capital Markets and TD Cowen downgraded the stock and adjusted their price targets.

feed.title: CSX (NASDAQ:CSX) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q4 CY2025 Earnings
feed.summary: CSX (NASDAQ:CSX) reported Q4 CY2025 sales and earnings that fell below analyst estimates. Revenue was flat year-on-year at $3.51 billion, missing expectations, and non-GAAP profit per share was $0.39, a 5.3% miss. The freight rail services provider has experienced a cyclical downturn in the Rail Transportation industry, impacting its revenue growth and operating margins over recent years.

feed.title: Capital One to buy fintech firm Brex in $5.15 billion deal
feed.summary: Capital One Financial announced it will acquire fintech firm Brex in a $5.15 billion cash and stock deal. This acquisition comes as dealmakers anticipate an increase in mergers and market debuts within the retail and consumer goods sectors. Capital One also reported a rise in its fourth-quarter profit, driven by higher interest income from credit card debt.

feed.title: Anteris Announces Strategic Investment from Medtronic to Continue Advancing TAVR in $320 Million Aggregate Capital Raises
feed.summary: Anteris Technologies Global Corp. has secured a $90 million strategic investment from Medtronic, part of a combined $320 million capital raise, to advance its DurAVR® Transcatheter Heart Valve (THV). This investment will support the global pivotal PARADIGM trial and push towards commercialization of the DurAVR® THV, which aims to improve aortic stenosis treatment with its biomimetic design. Both companies emphasize their commitment to advancing TAVR innovation and patient outcomes.

feed.title: CSX Corp. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: CSX Corp. announced its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results. For Q4 2025, the company reported an operating income of $1.11 billion and net earnings of $720 million, or $0.39 per share, noting expenses related to severance and technology rationalization. Full-year 2025 results showed total revenue of $14.09 billion and an operating income of $4.52 billion, with adjusted EPS at $1.61.

feed.title: Capital One to acquire Brex for $5.15 billion in cash and stock deal
feed.summary: Capital One Financial Corp. has announced its definitive agreement to acquire Brex Inc. for $5.15 billion. The transaction will be funded with approximately 50% cash and 50% stock. This acquisition marks Capital One's expansion into the business financial services sector by acquiring the fintech company Brex.

feed.title: Clorox to acquire GOJO Industries for $2.25 billion
feed.summary: The Clorox Company has announced a definitive agreement to acquire GOJO Industries, the maker of Purell hand sanitizer, for $2.25 billion in cash, with a net purchase price of $1.92 billion after tax benefits. GOJO, which generates nearly $800 million in annual sales primarily through business-to-business channels, holds the top market share in hand sanitizer. This acquisition is expected to expand Clorox's health and hygiene portfolio, generate at least $50 million in run-rate cost synergies, and be accretive to adjusted earnings per share in its second year.

feed.title: Mykita equips all optical demo lenses with Eastman Tritan Renew
feed.summary: German eyewear brand Mykita will start using Eastman’s Tritan Renew, a copolyester with 50 percent certified recycled content, for all its optical demo lenses beginning in April. This switch is expected to significantly reduce material impact, equivalent to saving 150,000 single-use water bottles annually. Tritan Renew is ISCC Plus certified and produced using molecular recycling technology.

feed.title: Freight giant J.B. Hunt taps Triumph to speed carrier payments
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. has joined the Triumph Network to use its automated payment solution, aiming to accelerate and streamline carrier payment cycles. This collaboration highlights J.B. Hunt's focus on technology and reinforces Triumph's position in providing efficient payment solutions for the freight industry. Triumph's CEO Aaron P. Graft and J.B. Hunt's COO Nick Hobbs both emphasized the strategic value of this partnership in creating a more connected and transparent freight ecosystem.

feed.title: 24M-share LTIP and governance up for vote at Qualcomm (NASDAQ: QCOM)
feed.summary: Qualcomm is holding its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on March 17, 2026, where shareholders will vote on several key proposals. These include the election of 11 directors, ratification of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as auditors, advisory votes on executive compensation and its frequency, and crucial approval for an amended and restated 2023 Long-Term Incentive Plan that would increase the share reserve by 24,000,000 shares. The Board also recommends voting against two shareholder proposals concerning special meeting rights and a report on China exposure risk.

feed.title: Clorox Announces Acquisition of GOJO Industries, Makers of Purell®, Market Leader in Skin Health and Hygiene
feed.summary: The Clorox Company announced its acquisition of GOJO Industries, makers of Purell®, for $2.25 billion in cash, including anticipated tax benefits. This acquisition expands Clorox's position in health and hygiene, integrating Purell into its portfolio, aiming to accelerate growth in both consumer and B2B channels. The transaction is expected to be accretive to Clorox's growth, adjusted EBITDA margins, and adjusted EPS in the mid- to long-term, furthering its IGNITE strategy.

feed.title: ROLLINS, INC. ANNOUNCES REGULAR QUARTERLY CASH DIVIDEND
feed.summary: Rollins, Inc. (NYSE: ROL) announced that its Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.1825 per share. The dividend is payable on March 10, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on February 25, 2026. Rollins is a global consumer and commercial services company specializing in pest control services.

feed.title: Intuitive Announces Fourth Quarter Earnings
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (ISRG) announced strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, with Q4 revenue increasing 19% to $2.87 billion and GAAP net income attributable to Intuitive rising to $795 million. The company reported significant growth in da Vinci and Ion procedure volumes, as well as an expanded installed base for both surgical systems. Looking ahead to 2026, Intuitive anticipates continued procedure growth and provides guidance for non-GAAP gross profit margin and operating expense growth.

feed.title: Fortune ranks IQVIA No.1 in health care reputation for fifth straight year
feed.summary: IQVIA has been named No. 1 in its category on the 2026 Fortune® World’s Most Admired Companies™ list for the fifth consecutive year. The company also earned first place in seven out of nine key attributes, including innovation and financial soundness. This recognition highlights IQVIA's commitment to advancing innovation and improving global health through the dedication and expertise of its employees.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated Declares Quarterly Cash Dividends On Its Common and Preferred Stocks
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated announced that its Board of Directors has declared quarterly cash dividends on both its common stock and six series of its preferred stock. The common stock dividend is set at $0.155 per share, payable on April 1, 2026. Dividends for the various preferred stock series will also be paid on April 15, 2026, with amounts ranging from $0.414612500 to $17.19 per share (or equivalent) depending on the series.

feed.title: $0.155 a share: Huntington keeps dividend flat, sets April payouts on common and preferred
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares Inc. (Nasdaq: HBAN) announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.155 per common share, maintaining the previous quarter's rate. This common stock dividend is payable on April 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 18, 2026. The company also declared quarterly cash dividends for six series of its preferred stock, with these dividends payable on April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record on April 1, 2026.

feed.title: Domino's® Announces Fourth Quarter/Year-End 2025 Earnings Webcast
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza, Inc. (Nasdaq: DPZ) has announced that it will host a webcast for its Fourth Quarter/Year-End 2025 earnings on Monday, February 23, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Results and supplemental materials will be available on the company's investor relations website earlier that day. The largest pizza company in the world will also archive the event on its website for replay.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (CSX) CSX Corp. Reports Q4 Revenue $3.51B, vs. FactSet Est of $3.54B
feed.summary: CSX Corp. reported Q4 revenue of $3.51 billion, falling short of FactSet's estimate of $3.54 billion. The company specializes in railroad transport services, including chemicals, coal, agricultural products, and intermodal transport. Despite the revenue miss, the article also mentions recent analyst rating adjustments and a mean consensus to "BUY" for CSX stock.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of PDD Holdings Inc. - PDD
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims against PDD Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: PDD) following reports of a broadened probe by the Chinese government. The investigation, which involves over 100 regulators, alleges misconduct including fraudulent deliveries and taxation issues, and was reportedly triggered by a physical altercation between PDD employees and inspectors. This news led to a 2.15% drop in PDD's American Depositary Receipt price on January 20, 2026.

feed.title: Jack Morton spins off Omnicom, merges with Impact XM and takes on PE backing
feed.summary: Less than two months after Omnicom acquired Jack Morton as part of its takeover of IPG, Jack Morton is spinning off and merging with experiential agency Impact XM, backed by private equity firm The Riverside Company. The combined entity will retain the Jack Morton name, with Impact XM CEO Jared Pollacco taking the helm as CEO and Jack Morton CEO Craig Millon becoming global president. The deal, which had been in discussions since late 2024, is expected to close in Q1 2026 and aims to enhance end-to-end experiential capabilities for clients, particularly in medical marketing through Jack Health.

feed.title: Jabil Insiders Sell Stock After AI-Fueled Rally
feed.summary: Jabil, a data center infrastructure company, experienced a significant stock rally in 2025, surging 58% against the Nasdaq Composite's 20% gain. Following this AI-fueled rally, several board members have begun selling off millions of dollars in company stock at the start of 2026.

feed.title: Insight Enterprises schedules Feb. 5 webcast to discuss 2025 results
feed.summary: Insight Enterprises, Inc. announced it will release its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on February 5, 2026, before market open. The company will also host a conference call and live webcast at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results. Interested parties can access the webcast and register for the conference call through the investor relations section of Insight's website.

feed.title: Foreign exchange and dollar performance is most concerning with stocks: Morgan Stanley's Toomey
feed.summary: Chris Toomey of Morgan Stanley Private Wealth commented that foreign exchange and dollar performance is currently the most significant concern regarding stocks. He discussed client questions and the relationship between policy and equities during an appearance on 'Closing Bell'.

feed.title: Amazon.com to Webcast Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results Conference Call
feed.summary: Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) announced it will host a conference call on Thursday, February 5, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET to discuss its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results. The event will be webcast live on amazon.com/ir, where the audio and slides will remain available for three months.

feed.title: Forecasting The Future: 12 Analyst Projections For IQVIA Hldgs
feed.summary: Twelve analysts have provided their projections for IQVIA Hldgs (NYSE: IQV), with an average price target of $255.58, reflecting a 13.31% increase from the previous average. Ratings range from "Hold" to "Buy," with "Outperform" and "Overweight" also represented. The article also details IQVIA's financial performance, citing strong market capitalization, revenue growth, net margin, ROE, and ROA, alongside a higher-than-average debt-to-equity ratio.

feed.title: Exclusive | Capital One Strikes $5.15 Billion Deal for Fintech Brex
feed.summary: Capital One has reportedly agreed to acquire the fintech company Brex for $5.15 billion in cash and stock. This acquisition would enhance Capital One's offerings to corporate clients by integrating Brex's technology for corporate credit cards, expense management, and rewards. Brex, founded nearly a decade ago, also manages approximately $13 billion in deposits.

feed.title: North Slope Exploration Success: APA Joins Alaska Oil and Gas Association
feed.summary: APA Corporation has announced its formal membership in the Alaska Oil and Gas Association (AOGA) following successful exploratory well results at Sockeye-2 on the North Slope. AOGA Board Chair Erec Issacson welcomed APA, highlighting their industry experience and the importance of fiscal stability in the Alaska oil and gas sector. APA's involvement is expected to contribute additional technical depth and global experience to AOGA's efforts to promote policies supporting production, jobs, and revenue for Alaskans.

feed.title: Analog Devices to Report First Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results on Wednesday, February 18, 2026
feed.summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (ADI) announced it will release its first quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. Eastern time. Following the release, the company will host a conference call at 10:00 a.m. Eastern time to discuss the results and business outlook with its CEO, CFO, and Head of Investor Relations. The event details and access information for the press release, live conference call, and archived copies are available on ADI’s Investor Relations website.

feed.title: RXNT Recognized as a 2026 Gartner Digital Markets Leader Across Five Categories, Highlighting Excellence in Ambulatory Healthcare Software
feed.summary: RXNT, a Maryland-based ambulatory healthcare technology company, has been recognized as a 2026 Gartner Digital Markets Leader, earning awards across five categories for its medical billing, practice management, and electronic medical records software, including specialties in mental health and physical therapy. This recognition is based on data-driven methodologies and positive customer feedback from Gartner Digital Markets' review sites. The company attributes its success to a strong commitment to customer satisfaction and adapting to user needs.
